metadata.description: ScholarAIO — Academic research terminal for Claude Code. Search, read, and analyze papers from your local knowledge base while coding.

plugins.name: scholaraio
plugins.description: Full ScholarAIO skill suite (22 skills): literature search (keyword/semantic/fusion), paper reading (L1-L4), ingestion, topic modeling, citation graphs, workspace management, BibTeX export, academic writing, and more. Requires Python 3.10+; auto-installs on first session.
